lessons.title: What is PHP?
lessons.description: Understand PHP and its role in web development.

lessons.title: Setting Up Your Environment
lessons.description: Install a local server (XAMPP/MAMP) and write your first PHP script.

lessons.title: PHP Tags and Syntax
lessons.description: Learn about PHP opening/closing tags and basic syntax rules.

lessons.title: Comments in PHP
lessons.description: Document your code using single-line and multi-line comments.

lessons.title: Echo and Print
lessons.description: Output text and variables to the browser.
